items.title_en: SK Hynix South Korean shares jump 11% as Asia tech stocks rally
items.title_zh: 亚洲科技股上涨，韩国 SK 海力士股价上涨 11%
items.desc_en: SK Hynix led a broad rally in Asian technology shares on Wednesday, tracking a rebound in U.S. semiconductor shares after a sharp selloff earlier this week.
items.desc_zh: 周三，SK 海力士引领亚洲科技股普遍上涨，追随美国半导体股在本周早些时候大幅抛售后的反弹。

items.desc_en: Twelve of the 13 victims were foreign nationals, Spanish authorities said on Tuesday.
items.desc_zh: 西班牙当局周二表示，13 名受害者中有 12 人是外国人。

items.title_en: Yum's Taco Bell removes select items, says no confirmed link to U.S. cyclosporiasis outbreak
items.title_zh: 百胜餐饮集团 Taco Bell 下架部分产品，称未确认与美国环孢子虫病爆发有关

items.desc_zh: 百胜餐饮集团 (Yum Brands) 旗下的塔可钟 (Taco Bell) 周二表示，作为预防措施，该公司已从一些餐厅下架了有限的商品，但表示美国卫生官员尚未将不断扩大的环孢子虫病疫情与冠状病毒联系起来。

items.title_en: Jim Cramer says concerns about AI market froth are overblown. Here's why
items.title_zh: 吉姆·克莱默 (Jim Cramer) 表示，对人工智能市场泡沫的担忧有些过分。这就是为什么

items.desc_zh: CNBC 的吉姆·克莱默 (Jim Cramer) 表示，如今的股市远没有互联网泡沫时期那么令人担忧。

items.title_en: Stock futures are flat after soft inflation reading lifts market: Live updates
items.title_zh: 疲软通胀数据提振市场后，股指期货持平：实时更新
items.desc_en: Stocks climbed Tuesday after a cooler-than-expected inflation report bolstered hopes that the Fed may not need to raise interest rates as aggressively.
items.desc_zh: 周二股市上涨，此前低于预期的通胀报告增强了人们对美联储可能不需要大幅加息的希望。

items.title_en: Elon Musk likely broke the law by giving voters $1 million, Wisconsin board says
items.title_zh: 威斯康星州董事会称，埃隆·马斯克向选民提供 100 万美元可能违反了法律
items.desc_en: Elon Musk likely broke Wisconsin law when he handed out $1 million checks to voters in the 2025 state Supreme Court election, a bipartisan panel found.
items.desc_zh: 一个两党小组发现，埃隆·马斯克在 2025 年州最高法院选举中向选民发放 100 万美元支票时，可能违反了威斯康星州法律。

items.title_en: Midnight social media curfew and scrolling curbs proposed for older UK teens
items.title_zh: 英国针对老年青少年提出午夜社交媒体宵禁和滚动限制
items.desc_en: Teens will be able to opt out of the restrictions - campaigners have criticised them as being piecemeal.
items.desc_zh: 青少年将能够选择不受这些限制——活动人士批评这些限制是零碎的。

items.title_zh: 员工起诉 Meta，指控使用人工智能进行裁员存在歧视
items.desc_en: The lawsuit filed by current and former Meta employees underscores rising concerns about AI's impact on jobs and people with disabilities in the workforce.
items.desc_zh: Meta 现任和前任员工提起的诉讼凸显了人们对人工智能对就业和劳动力中残疾人的影响日益担忧。

items.title_en: Here’s the inflation breakdown for June 2026 — in one chart
items.title_zh: 以下是 2026 年 6 月的通胀明细——在一张图表中
items.desc_en: The consumer price index rose 3.5% in June from a year earlier, a deceleration after several months of upward moves.
items.desc_zh: 6月份消费者价格指数同比上涨3.5%，在连续几个月上涨后有所放缓。

items.title_en: The AI boom just found two new winners: Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan Chase
items.title_zh: 人工智能热潮刚刚找到了两个新的赢家：高盛和摩根大通
items.desc_en: Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan showed that Wall Street is a major beneficiary of the AI boom, with record revenue driven by surging trading and investment banking.
items.desc_zh: 高盛和摩根大通表明，华尔街是人工智能热潮的主要受益者，交易和投资银行业务的激增推动了创纪录的收入。

items.title_en: SK Hynix options begin trading. But another group of stocks is stealing its thunder
items.title_zh: SK海力士期权开始交易。但另一组股票正在抢风头
items.desc_en: One explanation for the lack of notable call-buying is that the surge in single-stock ETFs and leveraged funds stole a big chunk of the speculative limelight.
items.desc_zh: 缺乏显着的看涨买盘的一种解释是，单一股票 ETF 和杠杆基金的激增抢走了投机者的大部分风头。

items.title_en: Strait of Hormuz 'faultline' exposes weakness of the US-Iran deal
items.title_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡“断层线”暴露美伊协议的弱点
items.desc_en: Control of the waterway has become a key point of contention between the US and Iran, as a ceasefire deal falters.
items.desc_zh: 随着停火协议的动摇，对水道的控制已成为美国和伊朗之间的一个关键争论点。

items.title_en: Caution warranted on this red hot AI cloud data stock that's now 'priced for perfection,' says Todd Gordon
items.title_zh: 托德·戈登 (Todd Gordon) 表示，对这只炙手可热的人工智能云数据股票应保持谨慎，该股现在“定价完美”
items.desc_en: Datadog runs the control room for modern software: it pulls data from a company's servers, apps and cloud services into one place.
items.desc_zh: Datadog 负责管理现代软件的控制室：它将公司服务器、应用程序和云服务中的数据提取到一处。

items.title_en: Trump pays writer E Jean Carroll $5m in damages over sexual abuse and defamation
items.title_zh: 特朗普因性虐待和诽谤向作家 E Jean Carroll 支付 500 万美元赔偿金
items.desc_en: The president had sought to delay the payment as he tried to persuade the Supreme Court to overturn the judgement.
items.desc_zh: 总统在试图说服最高法院推翻判决时试图推迟付款。

items.title_en: Trump scraps threat of 20% fee on Hormuz cargo as US prepares to resume blockade of Iran ports
items.title_zh: 随着美国准备恢复对伊朗港口的封锁，特朗普取消了对霍尔木兹货物征收20%费用的威胁
items.desc_en: Trump drops a 24-hour-old vow to charge cargo ships for using the Strait as the US continues its battle to break Iran's hold on the waterway.
items.desc_zh: 随着美国继续努力打破伊朗对该水道的控制，特朗普放弃了24小时内对使用该海峡的货船收费的誓言。

items.title_en: Tyrannosaurus rex most expensive dinosaur ever sold
items.title_zh: 霸王龙是有史以来最昂贵的恐龙
items.desc_en: The dinosaur skeleton, which roamed the planet 67 million years ago, was sold by Sotheby's in New York.
items.desc_zh: 这具 6700 万年前在地球上漫步的恐龙骨架被纽约苏富比拍卖行拍卖。

items.title_en: United Airlines' new upsell: Keeping other travelers out of the middle seat
items.title_zh: 联合航空的新追加销售：让其他旅客远离中间座位
items.desc_en: United Airlines will allow customers to pay more to keep the middle seat open on its Airbus A321XLRs
items.desc_zh: 联合航空将允许乘客支付更多费用以保持空客 A321XLR 上的中间座位空着

items.title_en: Israeli strike on police post in north Gaza kills seven, officials say
items.title_zh: 官员称，以色列对加沙北部警察哨所的袭击造成七人死亡
items.desc_en: A senior officer in the Hamas-run police force was among those killed in the strike, which Israel's military says targeted "terrorists".
items.desc_zh: 哈马斯管理的警察部队的一名高级官员在这次袭击中丧生，以色列军方称这次袭击的目标是“恐怖分子”。

items.title_en: Diamond giant De Beers halts work at flagship South African mine as demand plummets
items.title_zh: 由于需求锐减，钻石巨头戴比尔斯停止了南非旗舰矿的工作
items.desc_en: Production will stop for two years at the mine which employs more than 4,000 people.
items.desc_zh: 该矿拥有 4,000 多名员工，生产将停止两年。

items.title_en: Warsh promises inflation will be a 'thing of the past,' cites benefits of AI investment boom

items.desc_en: Warsh pledged Tuesday to "get monetary policy right" and defeat the inflation that has bedeviled the central bank for the past five years.
items.desc_zh: 沃什周二承诺“采取正确的货币政策”并击败过去五年来困扰央行的通胀。

items.title_en: Singapore court orders Bloomberg to pay $356,000 to ministers in defamation case
items.title_zh: 新加坡法院命令彭博社向诽谤案中的部长支付 356,000 美元
items.desc_en: The ministers claimed the piece, which cited their luxury bungalow deals, had tarnished their reputation.
items.desc_zh: 部长们声称这篇文章引用了他们的豪华平房交易，玷污了他们的声誉。

items.title_zh: 法国逮捕枫丹白露森林火灾纵火嫌疑人 - DW.com
items.desc_en: France arrests arson suspects amid Fontainebleau forest fire  DW.com1,000 evacuated from Fontainebleau fires near Paris; Spanish authorities identify some fire victims  ABC News - Breaking News, Lates
items.desc_zh: 法国逮捕了枫丹白露森林火灾纵火嫌疑人 DW.com 1,000 人从巴黎附近的枫丹白露火灾中撤离；西班牙当局确认了一些火灾遇难者的身份 ABC News - 最新新闻

items.title_en: 'If we die, we die together': Wife of man nearly sucked out of Ryanair plane speaks of ordeal
items.title_zh: “如果我们死了，我们会一起死”：差点被瑞安航空飞机吸出的男子的妻子讲述了磨难
items.desc_en: Svetlana Grković told Serbian media that her husband is "seriously injured and in shock".
items.desc_zh: 斯韦特兰娜·格尔科维奇告诉塞尔维亚媒体，她的丈夫“受了重伤，处于休克状态”。

items.title_en: How US commerce secretary's Epstein links were uncovered by British whistleblower
items.title_zh: 英国举报人如何揭露美国商务部长与爱泼斯坦的联系
items.desc_en: Simon Andriesz made the discovery about Howard Lutnick in publicly released Epstein files.
items.desc_zh: 西蒙·安德里斯 (Simon Andriesz) 在公开发布的爱泼斯坦文件中发现了霍华德·卢特尼克 (Howard Lutnick)。

items.title_en: Death toll from Bangkok bar fire rises to 30 as police probe safety lapses
items.title_zh: 警方调查安全失误，曼谷酒吧火灾死亡人数上升至30人
items.desc_en: Survivors and first reporters reported doors being locked and the lack of signage marking emergency exits.
items.desc_zh: 幸存者和第一批记者报告说，门被锁住，并且没有标记紧急出口的标志。

items.title_en: Australian police reveal unseen photos 25 years after British backpacker murder
items.title_zh: 英国背包客被谋杀25年后，澳大利亚警方公布了未公开的照片
items.desc_en: Police hope the images could jog memories that will help them find the body of Peter Falconio.
items.desc_zh: 警方希望这些图像能够唤起人们的记忆，帮助他们找到彼得·法尔科尼奥的尸体。

items.title_en: Hungary parliament votes to remove president from office
items.title_zh: 匈牙利议会投票罢免总统
items.desc_en: Tamás Sulyok was widely seen as a loyalist of former prime minister Viktor Orbán, who lost power in April after 16 years.
items.desc_zh: 塔马斯·苏廖克被广泛视为前总理欧尔班·维克多 (Viktor Orbán) 的忠实拥护者，欧尔班·维克多 (Viktor Orbán) 在 16 年后于 4 月失去权力。

items.title_en: 10 years of Pokémon Go and the millions still trying to catch 'em all
items.title_zh: 《Pokémon Go》问世 10 周年，数百万人仍在尝试捕捉它们
items.desc_en: Michael Steranka, vice president at the mobile game's owner Scopely, says it has always been about bringing people together.
items.desc_zh: 手机游戏所有者 Scopely 的副总裁迈克尔·斯特兰卡 (Michael Steranka) 表示，这款游戏一直致力于将人们聚集在一起。

items.desc_zh: 文件传输无云存储、无账户、无限制

items.title_en: Meta pulls new AI image feature after days of backlash
items.title_zh: 经过几天的强烈反对后，Meta 取消了新的人工智能图像功能
items.desc_en: Meta's release this week of an AI feature that let people alter Instagram content drew swift blowback.
items.desc_zh: Meta 本周发布了一项人工智能功能，可以让人们改变 Instagram 内容，但很快就引起了反弹。

items.title_en: Is the Assassin's Creed Black Flag remake worth the 13 year wait?
items.title_zh: 《刺客信条：黑旗》重制版值得 13 年的等待吗？
items.desc_en: The BBC's Tom Gerken plays the much-anticipated pirate game which has been remade from the ground up.
items.desc_zh: BBC 的汤姆·格肯 (Tom Gerken) 扮演了这款备受期待的海盗游戏，该游戏已从头开始重制。

items.title_en: Apple sues OpenAI, its employees claiming theft of trade secrets
items.title_zh: 苹果起诉 OpenAI，其员工声称窃取商业机密
items.desc_en: Apple said in a Friday lawsuit that OpenAI’s nascent hardware business is “rotten to its core.”
items.desc_zh: 苹果在周五的诉讼中表示，OpenAI 新兴的硬件业务“已经烂到了核心”。

items.title_en: EU threatens Meta with fines over 'addictive' Facebook and Instagram
items.title_zh: 欧盟因 Facebook 和 Instagram 上瘾而对 Meta 进行罚款威胁
items.desc_en: Regulators say features such as infinite scroll contribute to "compulsive use" and "unhealthy habits".
items.desc_zh: 监管机构表示，无限滚动等功能会导致“强迫性使用”和“不健康的习惯”。

items.desc_zh: 将 NotebookLM 转变为完整的研究工作流程

items.title_en: Big tech must deal with scam ads under Ofcom proposals
items.title_zh: 根据 Ofcom 的提议，大型科技公司必须处理诈骗广告
items.desc_en: Ofcom says more than half of UK adults have encountered potentially fraudulent ads online.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，超过一半的英国成年人在网上遇到过潜在的欺诈性广告。

items.title_en: 'Cool in 90 seconds' - the fake portable air conditioners sweeping the internet
items.title_zh: “90秒制冷”——假冒移动空调席卷网络
items.desc_en: The ASA says adverts claiming small devices can rapidly cool rooms were too good to be true.
items.desc_zh: ASA 表示，声称小型设备可以快速冷却房间的广告好得令人难以置信。

items.title_en: Pressure builds on Europe's biggest port to be greener
items.title_zh: 欧洲最大港口面临更加环保的压力
items.desc_en: A lawsuit demands that the Port of Rotterdam moves faster to cut its dependence on fossil fuel firms.
items.desc_zh: 一项诉讼要求鹿特丹港加快行动，减少对化石燃料公司的依赖。

items.desc_zh: 无需更改应用程序即可扩展 PostgreSQL

items.title_en: Porn site company fined £630,000 over failed age checks
items.title_zh: 色情网站公司因未通过年龄检查被罚款 63 万英镑
items.desc_en: Ofcom has fined a slew of sites it says are failing to prevent children accessing their adult content.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 对大量网站进行了罚款，称其未能阻止儿童访问其成人内容。

items.desc_en: The first goal-driven, proactive AI team for e-commerce

items.title_en: Outcry as Meta lets users make AI images from public Instagram profile pics
items.title_zh: Meta 允许用户从公开的 Instagram 个人资料照片制作人工智能图像，引起强烈抗议
items.desc_en: The tech giant said people can opt out - but privacy campaigners called it a "recipe for disaster".
items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头表示，人们可以选择退出，但隐私活动人士称这是“灾难的秘诀”。

items.title_en: Robots available for rent: But what can they do?
items.title_zh: 可供出租的机器人：但它们能做什么？
items.desc_en: Robotics tech is changing fast, so for many it makes sense to rent a robot.
items.desc_zh: 机器人技术日新月异，因此对于许多人来说，租用机器人是有意义的。

items.title_en: Microsoft cuts 4,800 jobs and shrinks Xbox in 'significant restructure'
items.title_zh: 微软在“重大重组”中裁员 4,800 人并缩小 Xbox 规模
items.desc_en: The sweeping layoffs equate to 2.1% of Microsoft's workforce, with 1,600 immediate job losses at Xbox.
items.desc_zh: 这次大规模裁员相当于微软员工总数的 2.1%，Xbox 立即失业 1,600 人。
